EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to add network interface {object.value} to virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} enabled network interface {object.value} of virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} unplugged network interface {object.value} from virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} updated network interface {object.value} of virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed network interface {object.value} from virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} added network interface {object.value} to virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to remove network interface {object.value} from virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to update network interface {object.value} of virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to plug network interface {object.value} to virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to unplug network interface {object.value} from virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} plugged network interface {object.value} to virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} disabled network interface {object.value} of virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
